title: Mission Raniganj
original_title: मिशन रानीगंज: द ग्रेट भारत रेस्क्यू
overview: A real-life story of additional chief mining engineer Jaswant Singh Gill who helped in the rescue of people when a coal mine in Raniganj, West Bengal, was flooded. The incident dates back to 1989.
